element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player must drive over elevated highways to paint them from white to green
Police cars constantly pursue; player learns evasion patterns
Collect and launch oil cans to stun police cars and traffic vehicles; stunned enemies can be rammed off stage
Block player movement, invulnerable to oil cans, cannot be killed; player must navigate around them
Car can jump over large gaps to reach higher sections of the stage
Spikes extrude from ground if player remains on same stage too long; instant death
Collecting three warps to new area and grants bonus points; optional content

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully painting a section of road
Stunning and eliminating a pursuing police car
typical_tension_triggers: Gaps requiring jumps to higher sections
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical chase-and-respite pattern; constant low-level threat from pursuing police with periodic spikes of danger from environmental hazards and cat obstacles; completion of painting sections provides brief relief before next threat emerges

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Red balloons appear on occasion; collecting three warps to bonus area—signals optional exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction stages (New York, London, Paris) establish core mechanics with manageable police pursuit and basic obstacles
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Middle stages (Germany through China) increase complexity with more intricate road layouts, denser enemy spawns, and tighter spatial constraints
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final stages (Japan, Australia, Americas) feature complex multi-level road structures, aggressive police AI, and frequent spike hazard triggers
notable_spikes: Stage transitions where new environmental obstacles appear
Stages with dense road layouts requiring precise jumps
Time-based spike hazard pressure increasing in later stages

notable_level_patterns.description: All 12 stages take place in famous real-world locations (New York, London, Paris, Egypt, India, China, Japan, Australia, South America), creating thematic variety and educational appeal. Each stage features iconic architectural backdrops.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage 6 (Egypt - Valley of the Kings), Stage 7 (India - Taj Mahal), Stage 12 (USA - Monument Valley)

notable_level_patterns.description: Fundamental level structure: player drives elevated highways while evading police cars and painting roads, then repeats with new enemies and obstacles. Success measured by painting completion percentage.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All stages follow this core structure

notable_level_patterns.description: Road networks feature elevated sections requiring jumps to traverse; creates three-dimensional navigation challenge within essentially 2D side-scrolling presentation
